personalInfo.name: Eren Berke Dogan
personalInfo.title: Software Engineer | AI Researcher | Full Stack Developer

highlights: Delivered new features and bug fixes in React + TypeScript, improving UI responsiveness and API reliability
Optimized backend endpoints and optimized REST requests, reducing average latency by 10%
Built reusable React hooks & modular components for dashboards used by 500+ users
Collaborated with designers and engineers in agile sprints, shipping weekly production updates

experience.company: NJIT Ying Wu College of Computing
highlights: Developed ML pipelines (LSTM) with NASA, using PyTorch & CUDA
Automated SLURM-based HPC experiments spanning 1000+ GPU hours
Engineered data preprocessing & model evaluation scripts, reducing experiment iteration time by 50%
Applied object-oriented design to modularize training, validation, and feature engineering workflows
Processed and analyzed 50+ GB neuroscience datasets in Python for reproducible scientific pipelines
Built automation scripts with Pandas/Numpy, reducing data validation time by 25%

projects.name: FlowNJIT — AI Course Architect
projects.description: Engineered an Agentic MCP server to orchestrate Gemini tool-calling for automated course scheduling. Implemented a two-stage RAG pipeline with ChromaDB and CrossEncoder for semantic re-ranking. Developed AI extraction pipeline with Pydantic validation to transform course descriptions into JSON schemas.

projects.name: Fashion AI App
projects.description: Full-stack prototype linking React Native front-end, Python backend, and SQL. Achieved 90%+ accuracy in clothing tagging using OpenCV & PyTorch. Designed LLM-powered styling engine providing instant, contextual outfit recommendations.
